summary: Data-only backfill verified: should_fire/must_not_fire/min_severity/max_emitted/beta byte-identical to prior label.json (judgement preserved); at the MEASURED values both premises hold — incident answer $20,926.79 (Sushi INV/WETH spot @manipulation block 14506358, matches documented TWAP peak ~$20,926 EXACTLY) vs honest DefiLlama reference $379.59 = +5413% divergence, ~1083x over the ~5% altcoin band, OVER-valued + FRESH feed -> ORACLE_FREEZE>=HIGH on INV-inverse-collateral still firmly fires; control answer $389.01 vs $380.26 = +2.30% well inside the 5% band -> must_not_fire + WARN/0 still benign. All 4 fidelity inputs measured=true with real on-chain(univ2 0x328dfd...)/off-chain(defillama) sources; reference_answer fields match fidelity prices ($379.59/$380.26). edge_id + probe key INV-inverse-collateral + oracle_address all exist in snapshots/INV.json. NOTE (non-blocking): EVENT.md prose and the snapshot illustrative edge weight still cite honest INV ~$8 (a stale researcher stand-in); the measured ~$380 (corroborated by both the off-chain reference AND the calm-day on-chain spot, and INV's real 2022 price history) is the faithful value and only makes the incident dislocation MORE extreme — tier unchanged. The $8 figure is illustrative TVL, not a price probe, so it does not affect grading.
